Formally present a guest (guests are never introduced, always presented).

Command Flags:

  --name , -n : Guest to address.
    type : string
    envvars : [BUTLER_PRESENT_NAME USER]
    required : true

Global Flags:

  --color : Use ANSI colors
    type : string
    choices : [true false auto]
    default : auto
    envvars : [WARG_COLOR]
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : auto

  --help , -h : Print help
    type : string
    choices : [allcommands compact default detailed outline]
    default : default
    currentvalue (set by passedflag) : detailed

  --term-width : Terminal width. Should be a positive integer, "auto", or "infinite". If "auto" the app will attempt to detect terminal width and fall back to 120 if detection fails
    type : string
    default : auto
    envvars : [WARG_TERM_WIDTH]
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : auto

Forwarded Arguments:

  This command accepts forwarded arguments after a `--` separator.

Footer:

Treat butler well, and he will serve you faithfully.
